title: Request to Update Colour Customisation for Accessibility
excerpt:

posts.author: kinga (Kinga Kubiak)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to request an update to the colour customization options for the form.

Currently, we can only change the titles and side panel backgrounds, while the main body remains white, and the text stays black. This setup limits accessibility, particularly for neurodivergent individuals who may struggle with high contrast or bright backgrounds.

Would it be possible to allow colour customisation for the entire background, main form, and text? This would help ensure the form is more inclusive and adaptable to different accessibility needs.
